sources.expression:
$wpdb->get_col($wpdb->prepare(
            "SELECT ID FROM {$wpdb->posts} WHERE post_type IN ({$placeholders}) AND post_status != 'trash' AND post_content LIKE %s",
            $args
        ))

$wpdb->get_col($wpdb->prepare(
                "SELECT DISTINCT p.ID FROM {$wpdb->posts} p
                 INNER JOIN {$wpdb->postmeta} pm ON pm.post_id = p.ID
                 WHERE p.post_type IN ({$placeholders})
                   AND p.post_status != 'trash'
                   AND pm.meta_key IN ({$metaPlaceholders})
                   AND pm.meta_value LIKE %s",
                $metaArgs
            ))
$wpdb->get_col( $wpdb->prepare( "SELECT action_id FROM {$wpdb->actionscheduler_actions} WHERE claim_id = %d AND status = %s", $claim->get_id(), self::STATUS_PENDING ) )
$wpdb->get_results( "SELECT comment_approved, COUNT( * ) AS num_comments FROM {$wpdb->comments} WHERE comment_type NOT IN('order_note','action_log') GROUP BY comment_approved", ARRAY_A )

$wpdb->get_col(
			$wpdb->prepare(
				"SELECT ID, post_date_gmt FROM {$wpdb->posts} WHERE post_type = %s AND post_password = %s AND post_status = %s",
				self::POST_TYPE,
				$claim_id,
				self::STATUS_PENDING
			)
		)

$wpdb->get_var(
			$wpdb->prepare(
				"SELECT {$column_name} FROM {$wpdb->posts} WHERE ID=%d AND post_type=%s", // phpcs:ignore
				$action_id,
				self::POST_TYPE
			)
		)

$wpdb->get_var( // phpcs:ignore WordPress.DB.DirectDatabaseQuery.DirectQuery, WordPress.DB.DirectDatabaseQuery.NoCaching
				$wpdb->prepare(
					"SELECT ID FROM {$wpdb->posts} WHERE post_type = %s AND CHAR_LENGTH(post_content) > %d LIMIT 1",
					$maximum_args_length,
					self::POST_TYPE
				)
			)

$wpdb->get_var($wpdb->prepare(
            "SELECT COUNT(1) FROM INFORMATION_SCHEMA.STATISTICS WHERE TABLE_SCHEMA = DATABASE() AND TABLE_NAME = %s AND INDEX_NAME = 'idx_submission_id'",
            $table
        ))

$wpdb->get_col($wpdb->prepare(
            "SELECT user_id
            FROM {$wpdb->usermeta}
            WHERE meta_key = %s
                AND meta_value = %s
                AND user_id > %d
            ORDER BY user_id ASC
            LIMIT %d",
            $specificFormsMetaKey,
            'yes',
            $lastProcessedUserId,
            self::BATCH_SIZE
        ))

$wpdb->get_results($wpdb->prepare(
            "SELECT user_id, meta_value
            FROM {$wpdb->usermeta}
            WHERE meta_key = %s
                AND user_id IN ({$placeholders})",
            array_merge([$allowedFormsMetaKey], $userIds)
        ))

$wpdb->get_results($wpdb->prepare(
            "SELECT ID FROM {$wpdb->posts} 
             WHERE post_type = 'attachment' 
             AND post_mime_type LIKE 'image/%' 
             AND guid LIKE %s 
             ORDER BY post_date DESC LIMIT 1",
            '%' . $wpdb->esc_like($name) . '%'
        ))

                'message' => 'Looks like the provided JSON is invalid. Please try again or contact support',
                'reason' => 'formFields JSON validation failed'
            ], 422)
wp_die('The name must be a valid string.')
wp_die('The label must be a valid string.')
wp_die(esc_html("The element must be one of the available elements, i.e: $elements e.t.c."))
wp_die(esc_html("The template must be one of the available templates, i.e: $templates e.t.c."))

wp_send_json_success([
            'message'  => __('Settings has been saved.', 'fluentform'),
            'settings' => json_decode($value, true),
            'id'       => $insertId,
        ], 200)

wp_send_json([
                    'message'        => __('You form has been successfully imported.', 'fluentform'),
                    'inserted_forms' => $insertedForms,
                ], 200)
$wpdb->query($wpdb->prepare("ALTER TABLE %1s MODIFY payment_total BIGINT UNSIGNED DEFAULT 1", $table))

wp_send_json_success([
                'nextAction'             => 'payment',
                'actionName'             => 'stripeSetupIntent',
                'stripe_subscription_id' => $subscriptionPayment->id,
                'payment_method_id'      => $paymentMethodId,
                'intent'                 => $invoice->payment_intent,
                'submission_id'          => $submission->id,
                'customer_name'          => ($transaction) ? $transaction->payer_name : '',
                'customer_email'         => ($transaction) ? $transaction->payer_email : '',
                'client_secret'          => $invoice->payment_intent->client_secret,
                '_ff_stripe_nonce'       => $nonce,
                'message'                => __('Verifying your card details. Please wait...', 'fluentform'),
                'result'                 => [
                    'insert_id' => $submission->id
                ]
            ], 200)

wp_send_json_success([
                'nextAction'    => 'payment',
                'actionName'    => 'initStripeSCAModal',
                'submission_id' => $submission->id,
                'client_secret' => $intent->client_secret,
                '_ff_stripe_nonce' => $nonce,
                'message'       => apply_filters('fluentform/stripe_strong_customer_verify_waiting_message', __('Verifying strong customer authentication. Please wait...', 'fluentform')),
                'result'        => [
                    'insert_id' => $submission->id
                ]
            ], 200)

wp_send_json_success([
            'nextAction' => 'payment',
            'actionName' => 'stripeRedirectToCheckout',
            'sessionId'  => $session->id,
            'message'    => __('You are redirecting to stripe.com to complete the purchase. Please wait while you are redirecting....', 'fluentform'),
            'result'     => [
                'insert_id' => $submission->id
            ]
        ], 200)

$wpdb->get_col($wpdb->prepare(
            "SELECT ID FROM {$wpdb->posts} WHERE post_type IN ({$placeholders}) AND post_status != 'trash' AND post_content LIKE %s",
            $args
        ))

$wpdb->get_col($wpdb->prepare(
                "SELECT DISTINCT p.ID FROM {$wpdb->posts} p
                 INNER JOIN {$wpdb->postmeta} pm ON pm.post_id = p.ID
                 WHERE p.post_type IN ({$placeholders})
                   AND p.post_status != 'trash'
                   AND pm.meta_key IN ({$metaPlaceholders})
                   AND pm.meta_value LIKE %s",
                $metaArgs
            ))

wp_send_json_error([
                    'message' => __('Validation Failed! Feed name is required', 'fluentform'),
                    'errors'  => $errors
                ], 423)

wp_send_json_success([
                'message' => __('Your settings has been updated and disconnected', 'fluentform'),
                'status'  => false,
            ], 200)

wp_send_json_success([
            'message' => __('Your mailchimp api key has been verified and successfully set', 'fluentform'),
            'status'  => true,
        ], 200)

printf( '%1$s %2$s, Oldest: %3$s, Newest: %4$s%3$s%4$s', esc_html( $status_labels[ $status ] ), esc_html( number_format_i18n( $count ) ), esc_html( $oldest_and_newest[ $status ]['oldest'] ), esc_html( $oldest_and_newest[ $status ]['newest'] ) )
$wpdb->get_col( $wpdb->prepare( "SELECT action_id FROM {$wpdb->actionscheduler_actions} WHERE claim_id = %d AND status = %s", $claim->get_id(), self::STATUS_PENDING ) )
$wpdb->get_results( "SELECT comment_approved, COUNT( * ) AS num_comments FROM {$wpdb->comments} WHERE comment_type NOT IN('order_note','action_log') GROUP BY comment_approved", ARRAY_A )

$wpdb->get_col(
			$wpdb->prepare(
				"SELECT ID, post_date_gmt FROM {$wpdb->posts} WHERE post_type = %s AND post_password = %s AND post_status = %s",
				self::POST_TYPE,
				$claim_id,
				self::STATUS_PENDING
			)
		)

$wpdb->query(
			$wpdb->prepare(
				"UPDATE {$wpdb->posts} SET post_password = '' WHERE ID = %d AND post_type = %s",
				$action_id,
				self::POST_TYPE
			)
		)

$wpdb->get_var(
			$wpdb->prepare(
				"SELECT {$column_name} FROM {$wpdb->posts} WHERE ID=%d AND post_type=%s", // phpcs:ignore
				$action_id,
				self::POST_TYPE
			)
		)

$wpdb->query(
			$wpdb->prepare(
				"UPDATE {$wpdb->posts} SET menu_order = menu_order+1, post_status=%s, post_modified_gmt = %s, post_modified = %s WHERE ID = %d AND post_type = %s",
				self::STATUS_RUNNING,
				current_time( 'mysql', true ),
				current_time( 'mysql' ),
				$action_id,
				self::POST_TYPE
			)
		)

$wpdb->get_var( // phpcs:ignore WordPress.DB.DirectDatabaseQuery.DirectQuery, WordPress.DB.DirectDatabaseQuery.NoCaching
				$wpdb->prepare(
					"SELECT ID FROM {$wpdb->posts} WHERE post_type = %s AND CHAR_LENGTH(post_content) > %d LIMIT 1",
					$maximum_args_length,
					self::POST_TYPE
				)
			)

printf( '

%s

', esc_html__( 'Action Scheduler migration in progress. The list of scheduled actions may be incomplete.', 'action-scheduler' ) )

wp_send_json([
                    'status'             => true,
                    'message'            => "Your forms has been successfully imported. " . $msg,
                    'inserted_forms'     => array_values($insertedForms),
                    'unsupported_fields' => array_values(array_unique(array_filter($this->unSupportFields)))
                ], 200)

$wpdb->get_var($wpdb->prepare(
            "SELECT COUNT(1) FROM INFORMATION_SCHEMA.STATISTICS WHERE TABLE_SCHEMA = DATABASE() AND TABLE_NAME = %s AND INDEX_NAME = 'idx_submission_id'",
            $table
        ))

preg_replace(
            [
                '/url\s*=/',          // Remove URL assignments
                '/http-equiv\s*=/',   // Remove HTTP equiv
                '/refresh/',          // Remove refresh attempts
            ],
            '',
            $description
        )

printf(
                                          /* translators: %d is the Number Email Summary Days */
                                          esc_html__('Let\'s see how your forms performed in the last %d days.', 'fluentform'), intval($days))

$wpdb->get_col($wpdb->prepare(
            "SELECT user_id
            FROM {$wpdb->usermeta}
            WHERE meta_key = %s
                AND meta_value = %s
                AND user_id > %d
            ORDER BY user_id ASC
            LIMIT %d",
            $specificFormsMetaKey,
            'yes',
            $lastProcessedUserId,
            self::BATCH_SIZE
        ))

$wpdb->get_results($wpdb->prepare(
            "SELECT user_id, meta_value
            FROM {$wpdb->usermeta}
            WHERE meta_key = %s
                AND user_id IN ({$placeholders})",
            array_merge([$allowedFormsMetaKey], $userIds)
        ))

$wpdb->query($wpdb->prepare(
            "UPDATE {$wpdb->usermeta}
            SET meta_value = %s
            WHERE meta_key = %s
                AND user_id IN ({$legacyPlaceholders})",
            array_merge(['no', $specificFormsMetaKey], $legacyUserIds)
        ))
fwrite(STDERR, 'Composer detected issues in your platform:' . PHP_EOL.PHP_EOL . implode(PHP_EOL, $issues) . PHP_EOL.PHP_EOL)
wp_die('File does not exist or unreadable.', '404 Not Found')

$wpdb->get_results($wpdb->prepare(
            "SELECT ID FROM {$wpdb->posts} 
             WHERE post_type = 'attachment' 
             AND post_mime_type LIKE 'image/%' 
             AND guid LIKE %s 
             ORDER BY post_date DESC LIMIT 1",
            '%' . $wpdb->esc_like($name) . '%'
        ))

                    'Terms and Conditions: %1$s Contains %2$d link. Use tab navigation to review.',
                    'Terms and Conditions: %1$s Contains %2$d links. Use tab navigation to review.',
                    $link_count,
                    'fluentform'
                ))

$wpdb->prepare(
			"
INSERT INTO $table_name ( $column_sql )
SELECT $placeholder_sql FROM DUAL
WHERE ( $where_clause ) IS NULL",
			$values
		)

$wpdb->prepare(
			"
SELECT action_id FROM $table_name
WHERE status IN ( $pending_status_placeholders )
AND hook = %s
AND `group_id` = %d
",
			array_merge(
				$pending_statuses,
				array(
					$data['hook'],
					$data['group_id'],
				)
			)
		)

$wpdb->prepare(
				"SELECT a.*, g.slug AS `group` FROM {$wpdb->actionscheduler_actions} a LEFT JOIN {$wpdb->actionscheduler_groups} g ON a.group_id=g.group_id WHERE a.action_id=%d",
				$action_id
			)

$wpdb->prepare(
					"UPDATE {$wpdb->actionscheduler_actions} SET status = %s WHERE action_id IN {$query_in}", // phpcs:ignore WordPress.DB.PreparedSQL.InterpolatedNotPrepared
					$parameters
				)
$wpdb->prepare( "SELECT action_id from {$wpdb->actionscheduler_actions} {$where} {$order} LIMIT %d FOR UPDATE{$skip_locked}", array_merge( $where_params, array( $limit ) ) )

$wpdb->prepare(
			"SELECT action_id, scheduled_date_gmt FROM {$wpdb->actionscheduler_actions} WHERE claim_id = %d ORDER BY priority ASC, attempts ASC, scheduled_date_gmt ASC, action_id ASC",
			$claim_id
		)
$wpdb->prepare( "SELECT action_id FROM {$wpdb->actionscheduler_actions} WHERE claim_id = %d AND status = %s", $claim->get_id(), self::STATUS_PENDING )

$wpdb->prepare(
				"SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT post_password) FROM {$wpdb->posts} WHERE post_password != '' AND post_type = %s AND post_status IN ('in-progress','pending')",
				array( self::POST_TYPE )
			)

$wpdb->prepare(
				"SELECT ID, post_date_gmt FROM {$wpdb->posts} WHERE post_type = %s AND post_password = %s",
				array(
					self::POST_TYPE,

				)
			)

				self::STATUS_PENDING
			)

				"UPDATE {$wpdb->posts} SET post_password = '' WHERE ID = %d AND post_type = %s",
				$action_id,
				self::POST_TYPE
			)
$wpdb->prepare( "UPDATE {$wpdb->posts} SET post_status = %s WHERE ID = %d AND post_type = %s", self::STATUS_FAILED, $action_id, self::POST_TYPE )

				"SELECT {$column_name} FROM {$wpdb->posts} WHERE ID=%d AND post_type=%s", // phpcs:ignore
				$action_id,
				self::POST_TYPE
			)

				"UPDATE {$wpdb->posts} SET menu_order = menu_order+1, post_status=%s, post_modified_gmt = %s, post_modified = %s WHERE ID = %d AND post_type = %s",
				self::STATUS_RUNNING,
				current_time( 'mysql', true ),
				current_time( 'mysql' ),
				$action_id,
				self::POST_TYPE
			)

					"SELECT ID FROM {$wpdb->posts} WHERE post_type = %s AND CHAR_LENGTH(post_content) > %d LIMIT 1",
					$maximum_args_length,

				)

            WHERE meta_key = %s

            array_merge([$allowedFormsMetaKey], $userIds)
        )

            "UPDATE {$wpdb->usermeta}
            SET meta_value = %s
            WHERE meta_key = %s
                AND user_id IN ({$legacyPlaceholders})",
            array_merge(['no', $specificFormsMetaKey], $legacyUserIds)
